arts.ttl: AC Milan 'give up pursuit of Man United outcast Marcus Rashford to focus on signing Kyle Walker from Man City'
arts.sum: Serie A rules dictate that top flight Italian clubs can only register one British player in their squad per year. This means they are only able to sign one of Rashford or Walker.

arts.ttl: Manchester City exit could be finalised in next few hours – Player said goodbye to City today
arts.sum: Kyle Walker is saying goodbye to his Manchester City teammates today ahead of a move to AC Milan. That’s according to journalist Mario Conterio, who reports that the Manchester City full back is ‘closer to Milan’ than ever before. According to his information, Walker did not train with Manchester City today. arts.ttl: Man City: Thiago Motta makes Andrea Cambiaso decision as City 'prepare £65m bid' for Juventus defender
arts.sum: City’s interest in the versatile full-back has been confirmed as Pep Guardiola seeks defensive reinforcements

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man City dump Man United out of race for next Martin Odegaard?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly out of the race to sign Rosenborg prodigy Sverre Nypan, whose representatives are discussing moves with Manchester City and Arsenal.
